caption: A young man with curly dark hair and a mustache, wearing a dark green cardigan and a patterned tie, lies in a field of yellow wildflowers below rocky mountains, reading a large newspaper. A dense mass of black smoke sweeps across the frame and engulfs him, and the scene transforms into a bearded man in a black suit and sunglasses riding an orange BMX bike down a sunlit suburban road, spreading his legs out playfully as cars pass by.
